name: WeChat MP Publishing
description_en: Help write and publish WeChat public-account articles from scattered ideas, drafts, or notes—lightly polishing rather than rewriting, generating cover and explainer images, and preparing the draft for upload to mp.weixin.qq.com with one command.
description_zh: 把零散思路、草稿或笔记整理成可发布的微信公众号文章——轻润色而非重写,生成题图与解释图,并用一条命令准备上传到 mp.weixin.qq.com 的草稿。
long_en: Preserves the author's voice and rhythm while handling the mechanical parts of WeChat publishing—imagery and draft upload.
long_zh: 在保留作者语气与节奏的同时,处理微信发布中机械的部分——配图与草稿上传。
sec_note_en: Can push drafts to your WeChat MP account, so it needs your account credentials; review every draft before it publishes.
sec_note_zh: 可把草稿推送到你的微信公众号账号,因而需要你的账号凭据;发布前请逐篇审阅草稿。
